revision.content:
Bloominglabs' Board Meeting

I. Called to order @ 1803

    A. Present: Calob, Kevin, Kyle, Jimmy, Pete, Joeseph, Apple

II. GigabitNow

    A. has recieved paperwork to proceed and will do so

    B. Right of entry confirmed December 30th

    C. will contact us for installation

        1. if no contact by 21st, Jimmy will contact them

III. UPS

    A. failed and locked up

    B. if it happens again will investigate replacing

IV. Cloud assets

    A. Our grant with Digital Ocean ended

    B. Consolidated onto one server @ $14 per month

    C. Bloominglabs will take on monthly payment

    D. CC with Porkbun for Makevention.org was expired

    E. Investigate linking bank accounts

    F. reconciled active members in freshbooks with:

        1. bloominglabs-members mailinglist

        2. bloominglabs-announce mailinglist

V. $1000 in unclaimed funds

    A. held by the state

    B. President will claim in next few days

VI. Annual Meeting (28th February)

    A. Annual Report

        1. President's Report

        2. Treasurer's Report

        3. Other Item of Interest

    B. Officer Elections

        1. Provisional Nominations

            a. President: Joeseph

            b. Secretary: Kyle

            c. Treasurer: Jimmy

            d. At-Large: Pete

            e. At-Large: Sam Boldenow? Sistoria?

VII. Makevention

    A. Lotusfest collaboration

        1. Fountain Square Ballroom will be available

            a. too small

            b. can tour

        2. colocation prospects look dim

    B. Thank you notes

    C. Pre-committee solicitations

VIII. Adjourned @ 18:49
